text:
/ci2 1 t3 この先に、面白い気配がしますねえ。
早く奥に進みましょうかあ。
リサ、先に行ってしまいますよお？

/ci2 1 t3 I feel like something fun's waiting
up ahead. Quickly! Let's go further.
Risa is going on ahead if you don't move!
